subject: Lunatone, a crescent moon-shaped rock/psychic Pokemon with a single dark eye, hovering over a rocky desert landscape under a night sky with a large visible moon
description: A crescent moon-shaped creature with a single prominent dark eye floats above a barren rocky terrain. The background shows a twilight or night desert scene with a large full moon dominating the upper sky and a gradient of purple and blue tones. The creature's body is pale and rocky in texture, with the curved crescent form oriented so the concave side faces forward. The landscape below is rendered in warm amber and brown tones with scattered rocks and low ground cover.
foreground: crescent-shaped rock creature with single dark eye, hovering above rocky ground
background: full moon in night sky over desert rocky terrain
emotion: blank, singular eye gives an alien, watchful quality
